title: agrostis pallens
intro: Agrostis pallens, also known as pale bent grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of Agrostis pallens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from minor skin irritations and infections. Agrostis pallens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or poultice, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
